gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system as students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; during the fair, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; students also line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, all situated amidst dozens of booths with colorful banners circling the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, as event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
